TC-001.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-001","title":"Create a TestBench from an empty bench slot using a discovered spec","level":"1","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled in settings.","At least one bench slot is empty","The focused project repo contains at least one file matching .specifications/*/test-cases.json","User is on the bench list view for the project"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open the option menu on an empty bench slot","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click 'Create a TestBench' from the option menu","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Spec-picker modal opens"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"'Create a TestBench' option is present in the menu"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the discovered-specs list in the modal","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Each discovered spec row shows slug, file path, and case count"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"At least one row matches a .specifications/*/test-cases.json file in the repo"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Click a spec row to select it","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"Row is highlighted as selected"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"Create button becomes enabled"}]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Click the Create button","observations":[{"id":"S005-O01","expected":"Modal closes"},{"id":"S005-O02","expected":"Bench is created with a worktree bound to the selected spec"},{"id":"S005-O03","expected":"Bench detail view opens"}]},{"id":"S006","instruction":"Observe the tabs in the bench detail view","observations":[{"id":"S006-O01","expected":"A 'TestBench' tab is the first tab with an amber accent dot"},{"id":"S006-O02","expected":"Standard tabs (Components, Terminal, Info) are also present"},{"id":"S006-O03","expected":"Inspection tab is present if previously configured"}]},{"id":"S007","instruction":"Click the TestBench tab","observations":[{"id":"S007-O01","expected":"TestBench content loads"},{"id":"S007-O02","expected":"The focused spec slug and path are displayed"},{"id":"S007-O03","expected":"The results panel is visible"}]}]}

TC-002.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-002","title":"Create TestBench option is absent when the feature is disabled","level":"1","preconditions":["TestBench feature is disabled in settings","At least one bench slot is empty","User is on the bench list view"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open the option menu on an empty bench slot","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"'Create a TestBench' option is NOT present"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Normal bench setup options remain visible"}]}]}

TC-018.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-018","title":"Review UI renders the grouped case list and progress bar on open","level":"1","preconditions":["A plan with at least one case per level (L1-L4) is loaded","The review tab is accessible"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Navigate to the TestBench review tab for the loaded plan","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Observe the left-pane case list","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Cases are grouped by level/priority with visible group headings"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Each row shows a status indicator (dot and label)"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"Raw JSON is not exposed"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the header area","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"A segmented progress bar (passed/failed/open) is visible"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Mono counts are displayed"},{"id":"S003-O03","expected":"Overall progress reflects the initial not_started state"}]}]}

TC-019.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-019","title":"Case detail shows full metadata, preconditions, steps, and observations","level":"1","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with a case that has preconditions, multiple steps, and expected observations per step","The review UI is open"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Click a case row in the left pane","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Observe the right detail pane","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Case title is displayed"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Case id, level, and priority are shown"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"Preconditions list is rendered in order"},{"id":"S002-O04","expected":"Ordered steps are displayed sequentially"},{"id":"S002-O05","expected":"Each step shows its expected observations"},{"id":"S002-O06","expected":"Each observation has a pass/fail mark control"},{"id":"S002-O07","expected":"Raw JSON is not visible"}]}]}

TC-038.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-038","title":"Result marks persist across page reload","level":"1","preconditions":["A project is registered and its roubo.yaml is valid","A spec exists at .specifications/<slug>/test-cases.json with at least two cases","TestBench is open for the spec on bench-1","No prior test-results.json exists"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark TC-001 pass and TC-002 fail using the result controls","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Reload the browser tab","observations":[]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Re-open the TestBench tab for the same spec and bench","observations":[]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Observe the result state","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"TC-001 shows pass"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"TC-002 shows fail"},{"id":"S004-O03","expected":"No data-loss error or recovery prompt is shown"}]}]}

TC-039.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-039","title":"Result sidecar is written beside the spec in the focused project repo, not in ~/.roubo","level":"1","preconditions":["A project is registered with repoPath /path/to/project","A spec slug 'checkout-flow' exists under .specifications/checkout-flow/","TestBench is open for this spec on bench-2"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark any case pass","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Inspect the filesystem for the created results file","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"/path/to/project/.specifications/checkout-flow/test-results.json is created"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"No test-results.json appears anywhere under ~/.roubo"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Verify the file structure","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"That entry contains result records keyed by case id"}]}]}

TC-040.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-040","title":"Source test-cases.json is never mutated when saving results or reconciling","level":"1","preconditions":["A spec with test-cases.json exists under .specifications/my-spec/","The SHA-256 checksum of test-cases.json is recorded before the run"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark several cases pass and fail and add notes","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Edit the plan to trigger staleness and apply reconcile","observations":[]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Verify the SHA-256 checksum of test-cases.json against the recorded value","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Checksum is identical: test-cases.json has zero bytes changed"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Only test-results.json was written or modified"}]}]}

TC-054.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-054","title":"A conforming test-cases.json validates successfully","level":"1","preconditions":["The zod source for the test-cases schema is compiled and exported","A well-formed test-cases.json fixture exists with all required fields populated"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Load the conforming test-cases.json fixture through the validator","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Validation returns success with zero errors"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"The parsed result matches the input fixture"}]}]}

TC-055.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-055","title":"A conforming test-results.json referencing valid case ids validates successfully","level":"1","preconditions":["The zod source for the test-results schema is compiled and exported","A well-formed test-results.json fixture references case ids present in the corresponding test-cases.json","The results file requires no edits to test-cases.json to be valid"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Load the conforming test-results.json fixture through the validator","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Validation returns success with zero errors"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"All result entries and referenced case ids are preserved"}]}]}

TC-066.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-066","title":"TestBench tab appears in app settings and the toggle defaults to enabled","level":"1","preconditions":["Roubo is running","No prior UserPreferences entry for the TestBench toggle exists (fresh state)"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open app settings","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click the 'TestBench' tab","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"A 'TestBench' tile is shown with a label, description, and a switch"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"The switch is ON (enabled) by default"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"No 'Disabled' helper text is shown"}]}]}

TC-069.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-069","title":"E2E: toggle TestBench off, verify hidden, toggle on, verify restored","level":"1","preconditions":["Roubo is running","TestBench is enabled (toggle ON)","The main UI shows the create-TestBench option and surface"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open app settings","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Navigate to the 'TestBench' tab","observations":[]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the switch state","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Switch is ON (amber) with no disabled helper text"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Click the switch to toggle OFF","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"Switch turns OFF"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"The disabled helper text appears"}]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Close app settings and inspect the main UI","observations":[{"id":"S005-O01","expected":"The create-TestBench option is absent"},{"id":"S005-O02","expected":"The TestBench surface is not accessible"}]},{"id":"S006","instruction":"Re-open settings, navigate to the 'TestBench' tab, and toggle ON","observations":[{"id":"S006-O01","expected":"Switch turns ON"},{"id":"S006-O02","expected":"The disabled helper text is removed"}]},{"id":"S007","instruction":"Close settings and inspect the main UI","observations":[{"id":"S007-O01","expected":"The create-TestBench option is visible again"},{"id":"S007-O02","expected":"The TestBench feature surface is accessible again"}]}]}

TC-003.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-003","title":"Spec-picker modal lists all discovered test-cases.json files from the repo","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","The repo contains .specifications/alpha/test-cases.json, .specifications/beta/test-cases.json, .specifications/gamma/test-cases.json","User has opened the Create a TestBench modal"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Observe the discovered-specs list","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Exactly three rows: alpha, beta, gamma"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Each row shows slug, relative path, and case count"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"No rows from outside .specifications/ are shown"}]}]}

TC-004.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-004","title":"Create button is disabled until a spec is selected","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","User has opened the Create a TestBench modal","No spec is selected and the manual-path input is empty"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Observe the Create button state","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Create button is visually disabled and cannot be clicked"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click the Create button without making a selection","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"No bench is created"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Modal remains open"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Select a spec row from the discovered list","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Create button becomes enabled"}]}]}

TC-005.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-005","title":"TestBench tab appears first and all standard bench tabs are retained","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","A TestBench has been created and bound to a spec","The bench has Components, Terminal, Inspection, and Info tabs configured"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Navigate to the bench detail view for the TestBench","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"The first tab is 'TestBench' with an amber accent dot"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Components, Terminal, Inspection, and Info tabs are present"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"Tab order is TestBench, then the existing tabs in their original order"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click each standard tab (Components, Terminal, Inspection, Info)","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Each tab opens and displays its normal content without interference from TestBench"}]}]}

TC-006.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-006","title":"Create a TestBench with a valid manual file path","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","An empty bench slot exists","A valid test-cases.json exists at a known path within the registered project repo","User has opened the Create a TestBench modal"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Locate the manual-path input field in the modal","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Type a valid path to a test-cases.json within the project repo","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Input shows a validating indicator while the path is validated"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Wait for validation to complete","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Input shows a green check (valid state)"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Create button becomes enabled"},{"id":"S003-O03","expected":"No error message is shown"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Click the Create button","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"Modal closes"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"TestBench is created bound to the manually specified spec"},{"id":"S004-O03","expected":"Bench detail opens with the TestBench tab showing the correct spec path"}]}]}

TC-007.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-007","title":"Re-point TestBench to a different spec and preserve prior results independently","level":"2","preconditions":["A TestBench is bound to spec-A","At least one result has been recorded against spec-A on this bench","Spec-B is discoverable in the same project repo","User is on the TestBench tab"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Click the 'Change focused spec' (re-point) action in the TestBench tab header","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Observe the spec-picker modal","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Modal opens"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Current spec (spec-A) is shown as active"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"Other discovered specs including spec-B are listed"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Select spec-B from the discovered list","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Spec-B row is highlighted"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Confirm button becomes enabled"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Confirm the re-point action","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"Modal closes"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"TestBench header now shows spec-B as the focused spec"},{"id":"S004-O03","expected":"Staleness is re-evaluated against the newly focused plan"}]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Re-open the spec-picker and switch back to spec-A","observations":[{"id":"S005-O01","expected":"Spec-A results recorded before the re-point are fully preserved and displayed"},{"id":"S005-O02","expected":"No results from spec-B are mixed into spec-A's result set"}]}]}

TC-012.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-012","title":"REST endpoint: POST creates a TestBench and returns the expected shape","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","An empty bench slot exists","A valid spec path is known within the registered repo"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Send POST /api/projects/:projectId/benches with body { variant: 'testbench', focusedSpecPath: '<valid-path>' }","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"HTTP 201 Created"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Response includes bench id, worktree path, variant 'testbench', and the focused spec path"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"GET of the bench returns variant 'testbench'"}]}]}

TC-013.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-013","title":"REST endpoint: GET discover specs returns all .specifications/*/test-cases.json","level":"2","preconditions":["The repo contains .specifications/suite-a/test-cases.json and .specifications/suite-b/test-cases.json","TestBench feature is enabled"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Send GET /api/projects/:projectId/testbench/specs","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"HTTP 200 OK"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Response is an array of two spec objects each with slug, path, caseCount"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"Slugs are 'suite-a' and 'suite-b'"}]}]}

TC-014.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-014","title":"REST endpoint: PUT re-point focused spec updates the binding","level":"2","preconditions":["A TestBench is bound to spec-A","Spec-B is a valid discoverable spec in the same project"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Send PUT /api/projects/:projectId/benches/:id/testbench/focus with body { focusedSpecPath: '<spec-B-path>' }","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"HTTP 200 OK"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Response shows the focused spec updated to spec-B"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"GET of the bench confirms spec-B"},{"id":"S001-O04","expected":"Spec-A's results file is untouched"}]}]}

TC-015.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-015","title":"Reviewer reaches first recorded observation within 5 interactions from Create a TestBench","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","An empty bench slot exists","At least one spec is discoverable","User is on the bench list view"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Interaction 1: open the empty-slot menu and click 'Create a TestBench'","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Spec-picker opens with discovered specs listed"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Interaction 2: click a spec row to select it","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Row is selected; Create is enabled"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Interaction 3: click Create","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Bench is created; bench detail opens with the TestBench tab active"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Interaction 4: click a case row to open its observations","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"The observation controls are shown for that case"}]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Interaction 5: mark an observation pass","observations":[{"id":"S005-O01","expected":"The mark is saved and reflected in the case"},{"id":"S005-O02","expected":"First recorded observation is reached in exactly 5 interactions, satisfying NFR-007"}]}]}

TC-020.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-020","title":"E2E: open plan, mark all observations, verify derived status, add note, verify progress","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan with two cases is loaded (case A two observations, case B one observation)","Git identity is configured on the bench","The review tab is open with all cases not_started"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Click case A in the left pane","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Observe the detail-pane status","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Status shows not_started"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Progress bar shows all cases open"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Mark the first observation of case A pass","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"The mark is recorded as pass with a timestamp"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Case A status updates to in_progress"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Mark the second observation of case A pass","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"Both observations are pass"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"Case A derives to passed"},{"id":"S004-O03","expected":"Progress bar shows one passed case"}]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Select case B and mark its observation fail","observations":[{"id":"S005-O01","expected":"Observation marked fail with a timestamp"},{"id":"S005-O02","expected":"Case B derives to failed"},{"id":"S005-O03","expected":"Progress shows one passed and one failed"}]},{"id":"S006","instruction":"Type a note for case B and submit","observations":[{"id":"S006-O01","expected":"Note appears as an append-only entry"},{"id":"S006-O02","expected":"Note shows author, timestamp, and status-at-write (failed)"},{"id":"S006-O03","expected":"No edit or delete controls are present"}]},{"id":"S007","instruction":"Observe the overall progress rollup","observations":[{"id":"S007-O01","expected":"Progress shows 1 passed, 1 failed, 0 open"},{"id":"S007-O02","expected":"Per-level counts are correct"},{"id":"S007-O03","expected":"Orphaned results are excluded"}]}]}

TC-021.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-021","title":"Mark an observation pass and verify a timestamp is recorded","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with an unmarked case having at least one observation","Git identity is configured","Review tab is open with the case selected"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Locate an unmarked observation in the step detail","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click the pass segment of the mark control","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Observation is marked pass"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"A timestamp is displayed adjacent to the mark"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"The mark persists on re-render without reload"}]}]}

TC-022.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-022","title":"Mark an observation fail and verify a timestamp is recorded","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with an unmarked case having at least one observation","Git identity is configured","Review tab is open with the case selected"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Click the fail segment of the mark control on an unmarked observation","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Observation is marked fail"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"A timestamp is displayed"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"The fail mark is visually distinct from a pass mark"}]}]}

TC-023.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-023","title":"Derived case status is not_started when no observations are marked","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with a case whose observations are all unmarked","Review tab is open"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Select the case with no marked observations","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Status label shows not_started"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Status indicator reflects not_started styling"}]}]}

TC-024.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-024","title":"Derived case status is in_progress when some but not all observations are marked","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with a case that has two observations, both unmarked","Review tab is open with the case selected"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark the first observation pass","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Status updates to in_progress"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Progress bar updates accordingly"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Confirm the second observation remains unmarked","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Status remains in_progress (not passed, not failed)"}]}]}

TC-025.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-025","title":"Derived case status is passed when all observations are marked pass","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with a case having exactly two observations, both unmarked","Review tab is open with the case selected"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark both observations pass","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Status derives to passed after the final mark"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Status indicator updates immediately"}]}]}

TC-026.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-026","title":"Derived case status is failed when all observations are marked and at least one fails","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with a case having two observations: one marked pass, one unmarked","Review tab is open with the case selected"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark the second observation fail","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"All observations are marked"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Status derives to failed (not passed) because at least one mark is fail"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"Status indicator updates to failed styling"}]}]}

TC-027.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-027","title":"Manual status override changes the displayed status and is recorded distinctly from the derived value","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with a case in not_started derived status","Review tab is open with the case selected"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open the status override select","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Select blocked","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Displayed status changes to blocked"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"An 'override active' marker is shown"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"The derived value is preserved internally and does not change"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the case row in the left pane","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Status reflects the override value (blocked), not the derived value"}]}]}

TC-028.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-028","title":"Append-only note is recorded with author, timestamp, and status-at-write","level":"2","preconditions":["A case is selected with status in_progress","Git identity is configured on the bench","The notes rail is visible"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Focus the add-note field","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Input is focused and ready"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Type a note and submit","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Note appears as a new entry in the rail"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Note shows author from git user.name"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"Note shows a timestamp near the current time"},{"id":"S002-O04","expected":"Note shows status-at-write (in_progress)"},{"id":"S002-O05","expected":"Note text matches what was typed"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the note entry","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"No edit control is present"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"No delete control is present"}]}]}

TC-029.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-029","title":"Progress rollup per level and overall updates as observations are marked","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with cases across multiple levels (L1, L2, L3)","All cases are initially not_started","Review tab is open"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Observe the initial progress bar and per-level counts","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Overall shows 0 passed, 0 failed, all cases open"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Per-level sections show 0 passed, 0 failed"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Mark all observations for one L1 case pass","observations":[]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the progress rollup","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"L1 passed increments by 1"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Overall passed increments by 1"},{"id":"S003-O03","expected":"Open decrements by 1"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Mark all observations for one L2 case fail","observations":[]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Observe the progress rollup","observations":[{"id":"S005-O01","expected":"L2 failed increments by 1"},{"id":"S005-O02","expected":"Overall failed increments by 1"},{"id":"S005-O03","expected":"The segmented bar reflects new proportions"}]}]}

TC-034.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-034","title":"Observation-mark persist round-trip completes within 150ms","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with at least one unmarked case","Typical CI or local-dev conditions","Performance instrumentation is active"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Record the timestamp immediately before clicking a mark control","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click the mark control and wait for the persisted confirmation","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"The click-to-persisted round-trip completes under 150ms at p95"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"No UI jank or blocking is observed"}]}]}

notes.text:
Overall, keyboard navigation seems poor.
- There is no visible focus ring on observations
- Generally, it is unclear where the current focus is, e.g., the test case remains highlighted (like it has focus) even when it doesn't

TC-036.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-036","title":"Marking observations is fully keyboard operable with visible focus","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with at least two cases, each with unmarked observations","Keyboard-only navigation is in use","Review tab is focused"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Tab through the case list rows","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Each row receives a visible focus indicator"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Focus order is logical"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Activate a case via keyboard and move to the detail pane","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Detail pane opens and focus moves to the first interactive element"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Tab to a pass/fail mark control and mark it via keyboard","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"The mark control shows a visible focus ring"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"The observation is marked without a mouse"},{"id":"S003-O03","expected":"Keyboard activation is equivalent to clicking"}]}]}

TC-035.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-035","title":"Virtualised list renders a 500-case plan at p95 under 300ms after data load","level":"2","preconditions":["A synthetic plan of exactly 500 cases across all levels is prepared","A render-timing harness is active","No prior render of this plan is cached"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Trigger data load for the 500-case plan and start timing","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Measure the time from data-load completion to the case list being interactive","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"p95 render time is under 300ms"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"List virtualisation is active: only a windowed subset of DOM nodes is rendered (not all 500)"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"Scrolling is smooth without layout thrash"}]}]}

TC-037.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-037","title":"Review UI produces zero vitest-axe violations on render","level":"2","preconditions":["A plan with several cases across levels is loaded","vitest-axe is configured"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Render the review UI with a populated plan in the test harness","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Run vitest-axe against the rendered tree","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Zero accessibility violations are reported"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"WCAG 2.1 AA ruleset is applied"}]}]}

TC-041.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-041","title":"Staleness banner appears when the source plan content hash changes","level":"2","preconditions":["A spec has test-results.json recorded against a known plan hash","TestBench is open and clean (no banner)"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Edit test-cases.json to add a new case (plan update)","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Refresh or re-open the TestBench tab","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"An amber staleness banner is displayed"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"The banner indicates the source plan changed"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the banner call-to-action","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"A 'Reconcile' action button is visible"}]}]}

TC-042.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-042","title":"Reconcile dialog lists added, changed, and orphan cases correctly","level":"2","preconditions":["test-cases.json updated: one case added, one title changed, one removed","test-results.json has results for all original cases including the removed one","Staleness banner is visible"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Click 'Reconcile' on the banner","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Observe the reconcile dialog","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"The added case appears in an 'Added' section"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"The title-changed case appears in a 'Changed' section"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"The removed case appears in an 'Orphan' section with its marks preserved"},{"id":"S002-O04","expected":"No case is silently deleted"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Click 'Apply (keep orphans)'","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"The added case appears with no prior result"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"The changed case shows its updated title"},{"id":"S003-O03","expected":"The orphaned case is visible as archived with its marks intact"},{"id":"S003-O04","expected":"Archived cases are excluded from the rollup"},{"id":"S003-O05","expected":"No purge prompt has appeared yet"}]}]}

TC-043.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-043","title":"E2E: record results, update plan, detect staleness, reconcile, verify data integrity","level":"2","preconditions":["A project is registered with a valid roubo.yaml","Spec 'auth-flow' has cases TC-A, TC-B, TC-C","TestBench is open for auth-flow on bench-1","No prior test-results.json exists"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark TC-A pass, TC-B fail with note 'broken redirect', TC-C pass","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Reload the TestBench tab and confirm results persisted","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"TC-A pass, TC-B fail with note, TC-C pass"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Edit test-cases.json: remove TC-B, add TC-D","observations":[]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Navigate away from and back to the TestBench tab","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"An amber staleness banner is shown"}]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Click 'Reconcile' on the banner","observations":[]},{"id":"S006","instruction":"Inspect the reconcile dialog","observations":[{"id":"S006-O01","expected":"TC-D is listed as Added"},{"id":"S006-O02","expected":"TC-B is listed as Orphan with its fail mark and note preserved"}]},{"id":"S007","instruction":"Click 'Apply (keep orphans)'","observations":[{"id":"S007-O01","expected":"TC-A and TC-C remain active with their pass marks"},{"id":"S007-O02","expected":"TC-D appears active with no mark"},{"id":"S007-O03","expected":"TC-B appears archived with its fail mark and note"},{"id":"S007-O04","expected":"The rollup counts only TC-A and TC-C"},{"id":"S007-O05","expected":"The staleness banner is dismissed"}]},{"id":"S008","instruction":"Inspect .specifications/auth-flow/test-results.json on disk","observations":[{"id":"S008-O01","expected":"The file contains a bench-1 key with results for TC-A, TC-B (archived), TC-C"},{"id":"S008-O02","expected":"test-cases.json checksum is unchanged"}]}]}
